summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KKTCX partner listing platform features. All 14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed all requested features are working correctly.
seed_data_creation: 50 profiles already exist with proper gender distribution
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified working: 1) 50 profiles showing on Partners page, 2) Filters show translated text (Gender/Cinsiyet, Service Type/Hizmet Türü) when language changed, 3) No duplicate filters (Orientation and Category duplicates removed), 4) Age slider works, 5) About page has PageBanner, 6) Contact page has PageBanner, 7) Menu has 'Ana Sayfa'/'Home' link, 8) Homepage title 'Tutkunun Adresi' is single line, 9) Partner detail page has all 5 social share buttons (WhatsApp, Facebook, Twitter/X, Telegram, Copy), 10) Report button shows toast message, 11) Message button navigates to login for unauthenticated users (expected behavior).

partners_page.filters_translated_turkish: PASS - Cinsiyet, Hizmet Türü, Şehir, Kategori, Yaş labels
partners_page.filters_translated_english: PASS - Gender, Service Type, City, Category, Age labels

contact_page.form_elements: PASS - Name, email, submit fields present

partner_detail_page.social_share_copy: PASS - Button present, shows 'Link kopyalandı' toast
partner_detail_page.report_button: PASS - Shows toast 'Şikayet etmek için giriş yapmalısınız' for unauthenticated users
partner_detail_page.message_button: PASS - Navigates to login for unauthenticated users (expected behavior)

backend_api.cities: PASS - Returns north and south Cyprus cities
